lobby.firstToWin: First to collect {{count}} badges wins the game
lobby.speedBonusExplanation: Players who finish their turn first earn more tokens per turn!
lobby.playerRemoved: A player was removed due to inactivity
lobby.speedBonusTooltip: Faster players receive a token bonus each turn.

config.badgesToWinTooltip: Number of badges needed to end the game.
config.stagesPerJourneyTooltip: How many wild pokémon you need to defeat to complete each route. Total wild pokémon will be double.
config.battleFrequencyTooltip: Every how many turns there will be a battle between players. 0 = no battles.
config.gymStrengthBonusTooltip: Extra strength of gym leader's pokémon according to level.
config.shinyChanceTooltip: Percentage chance of a wild pokémon being shiny.
config.catchDifficultyTooltip: Increase in difficulty to catch pokémon.
config.journeyTeamLengthTooltip: Number of pokémon you can take on a route.

toast.berryReadyDesc: A berry is ready to harvest on your farm!
toast.machineBrokeDesc: A craft machine broke down! Repair it for 1 token.
toast.nextGymRouteDesc: The path to {{name}} has been set. Available at level {{level}}.
toast.gymAvailableDesc: {{name}} is now open for challenges. Face {{leader}} and earn the {{badge}}!
toast.lowPokeballsDesc: You have only {{count}} in your bag.
toast.newMachineDesc: A new craft machine has been added!
toast.newPlotDesc: A new plot has been added to your farm!
toast.kitAppliedDesc: Your starting items have been added.
toast.berryRottedDesc: A berry rotted on your farm! Recover the plot.

encounter.selectToReplace: To use directly on your team you must select another
encounter.selectedGoesToBag: The selected pokemon goes to your bag

starterKit.pickClass: Pick a class for bonus items:

battle.byeMessage: You were not selected for battle. Wait for the next turn!
battle.woWarning: ⏱️ You have {{seconds}}s to choose your team. If time runs out, you lose by W.O.

farm.title: Berry Farm
farm.subtitle: Grow berries over time. Harvest them before they rot!
farm.farmGuideText: Each plot takes 3 turns to grow. Once ready, you have 2 turns to harvest before it rots. Use dust to fertilize and improve berry quality.

craft.title: Craft
craft.subtitle: Machines produce pokéballs each turn. They may break!
craft.machineInstructionsText: Every turn, each working machine rolls for production. Better levels improve your odds of crafting rare balls and reduce breakdowns.

berryTrade.speech: Hey trainer! I can trade berries with you. My offers change every turn!
berryTrade.alreadyTraded: We already traded today! Come back next turn.
berryTrade.noBerries: You don't have any berries to trade.
berryTrade.upgradeUncommonInfo: Trade 2 berries to receive a random uncommon berry.
berryTrade.upgradeRareInfo: Trade 3 berries to receive a random rare berry.

pokemon.rarityDesc: Each star represents an increase in a random stat
pokemon.levelDesc: Each level represents an increase in one of the pokémon's stats
pokemon.expTooltip: EXP: {{current}}/{{max}} — Defeat wild pokémon to earn EXP
pokemon.dustTooltip: Grants +1 EXP at the end of each turn. Only 1 dust is consumed per turn. Can be stacked up to 5.

error.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or reload the page.

gameInfo.title: Game Info
gameInfo.purposeText: PokéTactics is a non-financial game, made by a fan of the Pokémon series. No ads, no purchases — just fun.
gameInfo.objectiveText: Be the first to collect all gym badges! Explore routes to find wild Pokémon, catch them, train your team and challenge the gym leaders.
gameInfo.howItWorksText: Each turn you can explore routes, fight wild Pokémon, capture new allies, apply items, train at the academy, plant berries and craft. When a gym is available, challenge the leader to earn a badge. Everything happens in real time against other players — strategy and timing make the difference!
gameInfo.inviteFriends: Invite your friends and play now!

minigame.stayedDesc: Broke free from the pokéball! Try again.
minigame.skipCaptureDesc: Skip capture and move on. This action cannot be undone.

items.dustDesc: Grants +1 EXP at the end of each turn. Only 1 dust is consumed per turn. Can be stacked up to 5.
items.title: Items
items.maxDustDesc: {{name}} already has the max of 5 dusts.
items.berryActiveDesc: {{name}} already ate a {{berry}} berry and its effect is still active!
items.selectPokemon: Select a pokémon from your team:
items.incenseDesc: Increases the chance of encountering higher level Pokémon on your next route

journey.selectPokemon: Select {{max}} Pokémon for your route. Order matters — first will fight first.
journey.instructions: Defeat {{total}} wild Pokémon to complete the route. Each completed route grants rewards and levels you up. During the journey you can capture defeated Pokémon using Pokéballs.
journey.reorderBefore: First pokémon will fight. Reorder before starting.
journey.sendToBackTooltip: Send this pokémon to the back of the queue.
journey.sendToBackExplain: You can send pokémon to the back of the queue at the start or after each defeat.
journey.sendToBackUsedExplain: Defeat a pokémon to unlock again.
journey.threatDescAlert: Wild pokémon are alert. +1 stat buffed.
journey.threatDescAnnoyed: Wild pokémon are annoyed. +2 stats buffed.
journey.threatDescHeated: Wild pokémon are heated! +3 stats buffed.
journey.threatDescEnraged: Wild pokémon are enraged! +4 stats buffed.
journey.threatDescAggro: Wild pokémon are at their limit! All stats buffed.
journey.threatTooltip: Wild pokémon get stronger with each pokémon defeated on the route. Threat level decreases over turns, so be careful not to push too far.
journey.leaveRouteTooltip: Exit without fighting. Threat decays -2 each turn.
journey.expBonusAlive: Only alive pokémon receive +1 bonus EXP at the end.

gym.comeBackOnTurn: Come back on turn {{turn}} to challenge this gym!
gym.needTicket: You need a ticket to challenge the gym
gym.firstStarter: ⚠️ The first Pokémon selected will be your STARTER
gym.dontGiveUp: Don't give up! Train your Pokémon and try again!
gym.bestBattles: The best battles are the ones you learn from.
gym.skipGymHint: No cost to challenge the gym
gym.reachStage: Upon reaching stage {{stage}} of the route, come challenge me! From that moment on, you can challenge me every turn.

action.needPokemon: You need 3 pokémon in your team
action.needPokemonInTeam: You need {{count}} pokémon in your team

bag.pokemonHint: You can swap pokémon from the bag to your team to face the route
bag.itemsHint: You can apply items to your pokémon to improve their stats
bag.teamTooltip: Your main team, you must have at least 3 pokémon and at most 6. During routes, battles and gyms you can only use 3 pokémon, but you can choose the 3 from your team of 6.

box.openDesc: Click to open and receive a random item.

training.title: Training Camp
training.subtitle: Place a Pokémon to train. Equipment rolls each turn for EXP.
training.guideDesc: After settling for 1 turn, equipment rolls each turn for EXP. It may break — repair with 1 token.
training.removeDesc: This Pokémon will return to your box.

daycare.title: Poke Day Care
daycare.subtitle: Leave pokémons at the daycare to earn tokens and buy items.
daycare.noPokemon: You have no available pokémons in your bag to leave at the daycare.
daycare.selectToRelease: Select pokémons to leave at the daycare

tutorial.step0: Welcome to Route 1! Let's begin our journey here. You received your pokémon and must face the gyms until you earn all the badges. Along the way, I have a few things to teach you, so pay attention...
tutorial.step1: Here you'll find the important data to track how the game is going: your name for identification, turns, tasks, economy and badges. Tasks renew whenever you complete one, and you can always check your progress here. Your economy can grow with each token you accumulate. Badges are the goal of the game, so defeat the gyms!
tutorial.step2: This is your quick reference for consumable and usable items. Here you can quickly see how many items you have.
tutorial.step3: These are the game screens. Each button activates a different screen. They may become locked in some cases that require an action to unlock. The entire top bar may disappear during some events like the 'Route', but we'll get to that.
tutorial.step4: This is where your team is! You can carry between 3 and 6 pokémon, with a minimum of 3 required. Choose wisely for your path.
tutorial.step5: This is the pokémon box. Here your stored pokémon that aren't on the team are kept. You can click them to move them to your team when there's space.
tutorial.step6: And here we have the usable items! You can use them to receive resources or apply them to your pokémon to improve their stats.
tutorial.step7: This bar shows which events you'll face each turn. You can see events up to one turn ahead and check the steps you took in the current turn. There's also the end turn button. When you end your turn, you must wait for the other trainers to advance.
tutorial.step8: Here you leave your pokémon at the daycare to earn tokens and can use the shop. Pokémon left here cannot be recovered, so think carefully!
tutorial.step9: You can leave a spare pokémon from your bag to train here at the training camp. But you need to buy a slot first. You can also upgrade the equipment to improve training results.
tutorial.step10: Here you can buy plots to grow your berries. They take a few turns to be ready and you must harvest them, otherwise they may rot. You can also buy seed upgrades to improve the rarity of berries produced.
tutorial.step11: You have access to machines that produce pokéballs! Buy one and it produces each turn with the chances shown below. They can break, so be sure to repair them when needed.
tutorial.step12: Here you can view the route you're traveling, analyzing the pokémon you're facing and checking how many you need to defeat until the next route.
tutorial.step13: You can check the gyms, their pokémon, and plan your strategy to defeat them. Good luck, trainer!
tutorial.step14: Here are the game settings. You can change the language, switch the theme, and also leave the game if needed.
tutorial.step15: You're ready to continue your journey now! Use everything you've learned and earn all the badges. Good luck, trainer!

consulta.title: Reference Guide
consulta.threatExplanation: Threat is a difficulty scaling mechanic. The more wild pokémon you defeat on a route, the stronger the next ones become.
consulta.threatIncrement: +1 per wild pokémon defeated on route
consulta.threatCapture: Affects escape rate on capture (higher threat = harder to catch)
consulta.statBudget: Each pokémon has a fixed budget of 18 points distributed among 6 stats, proportional to PokeAPI base stats.
consulta.statRange: Base range: 1–6 per stat (max cap: 6). With effort: up to 8.
consulta.statEffort: Effort (0–2) is added after the cap, allowing stats higher than 6.
consulta.statDef: Defense = DEF + 10. Attacker must overcome for full hit
consulta.statAcc: Added to attacker's d20 roll to hit
consulta.statEvs: If d20 ≤ EVS → miss. Also determines who attacks first
consulta.itemIncense: Increases the chance of encountering higher tier pokémon on your next route.
consulta.itemDust: +2 EXP per turn for the pokémon holding it (max 5 per pokémon).
consulta.itemGymTicket: Required to challenge the gym. Max 2.
consulta.combatIntro: Each attack rolls a d20 (1–20) and resolves in the following priority:
consulta.combatPriority: Priority: EVS → CRT → ACC vs DEF
consulta.combatHit: Roll + ACC + bonus > DEF + 10 + bonus → ATK
consulta.effectiveAtkDesc: Effective damage is smoothed by: baseAtk + (rawAtk - baseAtk) × 0.8, where baseAtk = level + 2.
consulta.effectiveDefDesc: Defense = DEF + 10. Attacker needs roll + ACC to overcome this value for a full hit.
consulta.elementalDesc: Advantage is calculated by: effective types - ineffective types against the defender.
consulta.shieldDesc: Reduces the first hit to half damage. If it's a miss, the shield is not consumed.
consulta.resistanceDesc: If the defender has resistance to the element: +5 DEF additional.

typeKnowledge.name: Type Knowledge
typeKnowledge.description: Lower the difficulty to catch for 5 different elements.

typeSpecialist.name: Type Specialist
typeSpecialist.description: Lower the difficulty to catch for 1 specific element.

pokeBelt.name: Poke Belt
pokeBelt.description: Gain a set amount of Pokeballs.

dustBoost.name: Dust Boost
dustBoost.description: Each dust consumed gives extra EXP. Also grants dust immediately.

shinyCharm.name: Shiny Charm
shinyCharm.description: You increase your chance in finding shiny Pokémon.

trainer.name: Trainer
trainer.description: Each alive pokémon gains bonus EXP at the end of a journey route.

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: Gain extra reorder charges and increased route vision per journey.

potionMaster.name: Potion Master
potionMaster.description: Your potions heal for extra HP.

tokenEconomy.name: Token Economy
tokenEconomy.description: Gain extra daycare tokens per turn.

rareEncounter.name: Rare Encounter
rareEncounter.description: You increase the chance to finding a rare Pokémon. (not Shiny)

levelEncounter.name: Level Encounter
levelEncounter.description: You increase the chance to finding a higher level Pokémon on encounters.

seedImprovement.name: Seed Improvement
seedImprovement.description: Improve the quality of berries from your farm plots.

newPieces.name: New Pieces
newPieces.description: Improve the quality of balls produced by your machines.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.description: Harvest 2 berries per plot, but berry quality is reduced.

fireUp.name: Fire Up
fireUp.description: Machines produce 2 balls per turn, but ball quality is reduced.

minigame.name: Minigame
minigame.description: Increases the zones on the catch minigame.

tasking.name: Tasking
tasking.description: Gain an extra pokebox when completing a task.

potentializer.name: Potentializer
potentializer.description: Increases the duration of berry effects.
